title: Smart Commit: English summary with Spanish examples
original_text: Fixed language detection when an English summary contains Spanish examples inside fenced text blocks. The generator now ignores quoted examples and embedded git commit snippets while deciding the output language, so English explanations stay in English even when they mention Spanish test cases. Updated smart_commit_nltk.py and tests/test_smart_commit_nltk.py. Result: 38 tests OK.
expected_subject: fix(nlp): keep English output for Spanish examples
expected_body_lines: - Ignore fenced examples during language detection
- Ignore embedded git commit snippets for language scoring
- Preserve English output for English summaries
- Add regression test for Spanish examples in English text
expected_command: git commit -m "fix(nlp): keep English output for Spanish examples"
